content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch against 26edf3340c5c84297ede274973eeba3b7085ad30, ignoring .ralph-burning runtime state. Found three fix-current correctness/safety issues.

## Amendments

1. src/cli/run.rs:1002 closes the bead before sync_terminal_milestone_task_with_options has proven that the terminal attempt will be reconciled. That sync can still return Ok(false) for completed runs when lineage repair is disabled or blocked (src/cli/run.rs:1578-1591) or when no repairable lineage exists (src/cli/run.rs:1630-1635). In those cases the CLI can run br update --status=closed and then report no milestone sync, leaving a stale or unreconcilable project as a closed bead without a recorded success. Gate the close behind the same lineage validation path, while preserving close-before-success ordering once the attempt is known reconcileable.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This can corrupt the bead graph by closing work that the milestone state intentionally refused to mark complete.
2. src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8210-8231 still backfills follow_up_or_amendments as legacy fix_current_bead items whenever the text is not an exact match for classified_findings. Because build_queued_amendments then queues only trigger-restart items at src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8296-8299, a reviewer can classify a finding as covered_by_existing_bead or propose_new_bead but include a semantically identical, differently worded legacy follow-up, causing apply_fixes to run anyway. Make classified_findings authoritative when it is non-empty, or otherwise prevent the legacy fallback from reclassifying deferred findings as fix-current.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This undermines the core routing change by allowing deferred classifications to flow through the immediate fix path.
3. src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1327 posts the covered_by_existing_bead comment before checking whether the bead export is safe to mutate; the only health gate is sync_own_dirty_if_beads_healthy at src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1340-1342, after the mutation already happened. If .beads/issues.jsonl is conflicted or malformed, reconciliation can still call br comments add and only then refuse to flush. Add a pre-mutation beads-health guard before comment_bead, matching the existing close and planned-elsewhere comment safety pattern.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: Comment reconciliation is a bead mutation and should not touch an unsafe bead graph before the guard runs.
